import pandas as pd
import openpyxl

# Examine ERP-2025-table10.xls structure
print("=== ERP-2025-table10.xls ===")
xl_file = pd.ExcelFile('ERP-2025-table10.xls')
print("Sheet names:", xl_file.sheet_names)
df_pce = pd.read_excel('ERP-2025-table10.xls', sheet_name=0)
print("\nFirst few rows:")
print(df_pce.head(10))
print("\nShape:", df_pce.shape)
print("\nColumn names:", df_pce.columns.tolist())

# Examine ERP-2025-table12.xls structure

print("Sheet names:", xl_file.sheet_names)
df_pfi = pd.read_excel('ERP-2025-table12.xls', sheet_name=0)
print("\nFirst few rows:")
print(df_pfi.head(10))
print("\nShape:", df_pfi.shape)
print("\nColumn names:", df_pfi.columns.tolist())

EOF
